mainEntity.name: Is Porur becoming a good area for company registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Porur's IT corridor is growing rapidly. DLF IT Park provides commercial office space, and the Mount-Poonamallee Road development is attracting new businesses. Lower costs than OMR.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle GST returns for IT companies at DLF Park Porur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Virtual Auditor handles monthly GSTR-1/3B filing, annual return, ITC reconciliation, and GST audit for IT companies across all Chennai locations including the Porur corridor.

mainEntity.name: What audit services do you provide for Porur businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Statutory audit, tax audit under Section 44AB, GST audit, and internal audit. For healthcare companies near Ramachandra Hospital: specialized compliance covering clinical establishment licensing.

mainEntity.name: What is sell-side due diligence for startups in Porur, Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sell-side DD is due diligence conducted for the startup before approaching investors — identifying and fixing governance gaps proactively. Covers 40 points across 7 domains: cap table, board, FEMA, registers, ESOP, RPTs, and tax. Cost: ₹3-8 lakh. Saves ₹20-60+ lakh in investor-discovered findings.

mainEntity.name: When should I start DD preparation for Series A?

acceptedAnswer.text: 6 months before approaching investors — minimum 3 months. FEMA filings take 30+ days to process. ROC remediation takes time. The gap between 'we discovered the problem' and 'it's fixed' is 4-8 weeks minimum.

mainEntity.name: What are the most common DD findings?

acceptedAnswer.text: FC-GPR not filed for prior FDI rounds (60%+ of startups with FDI). Board resolutions without FEMA language. ESOP pool exceeded. Undisclosed related party transactions. Missing ROC filings. Cap table not reconciled with MCA records.

mainEntity.name: How is Virtual Auditor's DD different from a law firm's DD?

acceptedAnswer.text: Law firms check compliance. We check compliance AND financial reality. The CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) credential enables us to apply forensic analysis: revenue quality assessment, expense normalization, related party network mapping, and Fraud Triangle analysis. Investors increasingly want this forensic lens.

mainEntity.name: What does the DD report look like?

acceptedAnswer.text: Traffic-light classification: GREEN (compliant), AMBER (fix before investor DD), RED (fix immediately). Each finding has: description, regulatory reference, risk assessment, remediation action, timeline, and cost estimate. Plus a data room preparation guide.

mainEntity.name: Can you remediate the findings you discover?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Virtual Auditor is a full-service compliance firm, not just a DD advisor. We file late FEMA forms, prepare compounding applications, draft missing board resolutions, reconcile cap tables, and prepare statutory registers. One firm identifies AND fixes.

mainEntity.name: How much does startup due diligence cost in Porur, Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sell-side DD: ₹3,00,000-₹8,00,000. FEMA remediation package: ₹1,50,000-₹5,00,000. Complete Series A governance package: ₹6,00,000-₹20,00,000. On a ₹30 crore round: governance prep is 0.2-0.7% of capital raised.

@graph.name: How to Get Startup Due Diligence & Investment Advisory in Porur, Chennai

step.name: Engagement Scoping
step.text: Define DD type: sell-side (conducted for the startup before investor DD) or buy-side (conducted for the investor). Identify the 7 governance domains: cap table, board compliance, FEMA filings, statutory registers, ESOP, related party transactions, and tax compliance.

step.name: Cap Table and Corporate Records Review
step.text: Verify every share allotment against PAS-3 filings. Reconcile register of members with MCA records. Confirm authorized capital sufficiency. Verify ESOP pool within approved limits. Check SHA/AoA alignment for investor rights (liquidation preference, anti-dilution, veto).

step.name: FEMA Compliance Audit
step.text: For every prior FDI round: verify FC-GPR filed and acknowledged, valuation report dated within 90 days of allotment, board resolution with FEMA language, FIRC obtained, and pricing at or above FEMA floor. Identify contraventions requiring compounding.

step.name: Financial and Tax Due Diligence
step.text: Analyze financial statements for revenue quality: related party revenue, channel stuffing, timing manipulation. Verify TDS deposits (26AS reconciliation). GST filed and reconciled. Advance tax adequate. Pending demands or SCNs identified and disclosed.

step.name: Red Flag Analysis (CFE Methodology)
step.text: Apply the CFE Fraud Triangle framework: identify pressure, opportunity, and rationalization patterns. Screen for revenue manipulation (7 patterns), expense red flags, working capital anomalies, and related party network mapping through MCA director search.

step.name: Report and Remediation Plan
step.text: Deliver DD report with traffic-light classification: GREEN (compliant), AMBER (fix before DD), RED (fix before approaching investors). Include specific remediation actions, timeline, and cost estimates. Prepare the data room for investor DD.
